opportunities.title: Virtual Receptionist VA Fast Hiring 24 Hour Review
opportunities.description:
Important: Selected applicants will receive a response within 24 hours. Due to the volume of applications, we may move forward with other candidates if we do not receive a timely response.

We are currently hiring for a long-term Remote Receptionist position. Responsibilities include answering inbound calls, scheduling appointments, de-escalating complaints, and completing administrative tasks in a fast-paced environment. This is a performance-based role where all calls are recorded and regularly audited for quality assurance.

opportunities.title: [Hiring] Blender Animator + 3d Modeler, price starting at $15 per video going up
opportunities.description:
[Hiring] Blender Animator + 3d Modeler, price starting at $15 per video going up

I'm a short-form content creator who has generated tens of thousands of dollars from YouTube. I'm launching a new channel using Blender animations with the default Roblox rig, and I'm looking for reliable people to work with me long-term. Pay - $15–40 per video, depending on length/complexity Requirements - Responsive - Portfolio or examples required If interested: DM me with your portfolio/examples and I'll send an example video.   submitted by   /u/Salt-Ad1599 [link]   [comments]
